message:
test(connectors): expand Make (+95) and Anna's Archive (+55) test suites

Make: 74→169 tests across client, connector, error, types modules.
Anna's Archive: 87→142 tests across client, connector, error, types.
Also adds fcp-make to workspace members.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -106,6 +106,7 @@ members = [
     "connectors/kubernetes",
     "connectors/terraform",
     "connectors/annas-archive",
+    "connectors/make",
 ]
 
 # Default to the FCP2 platform core crates (connectors are explicitly targeted).
